- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-eraseme

## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |

| CI / tests (HEAD) | PASS | CI workflow succeeded; CodeQL succeeded; 5 local test failures are environment-specific (OllamaClient) |

## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] README MCP server description stale**
  - **Status quo:** README.md line 39 says "exposes a `redact_file` tool" but PR #476 expanded the MCP server to expose 21 CLI operations.
  - **Likely cause:** README was not updated when MCP expansion shipped in #476.
  - **Proposed solution:** Update README MCP section to reflect 21 tools, or make it version-agnostic.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] New features not reflected in README**
  - **Status quo:** Multi-folder poll-inbox (#481), Himalaya v1.2 compat (#467), AgentLLMClient (#470), cron-based polling (#477) are not listed in README features.
  - **Likely cause:** README feature list was not updated for v0.7.0 changes.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add new features to README Features section.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] CHANGELOG missing v0.6.2 entry**
  - **Status quo:** CHANGELOG.md jumps from v0.6.1 to v0.6.0; no v0.6.2 entry exists.
  - **Likely cause:** v0.6.2 was released without updating CHANGELOG.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add v0.6.2 entry to CHANGELOG, or include in v0.7.0 release notes.
  - **Handoff:** Include in v0.7.0 release commit

- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Patch coverage low**
  - **Status quo:** Only ~6% of changed lines are covered by tests.
  - **Likely cause:** New features were added with tests only for the new modules, not all changed code.
  - **Proposed solution:** This is advisory only — no hard coverage gate exists.
  - **Handoff:** None (WARN only)

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
- `pyproject.toml:3` version `0.6.2` → `0.7.0` (already applied in previous run)
